name: ChatGPT
disclosure_text: ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.
disclosure_location: Bottom of chat interface, below input box
opt_out_path: Profile > Settings > Data Controls > Improve the model for everyone
consent_flow: Default opt-in for training; user must navigate to settings to disable. Separate toggle for voice mode training added in 2026.
data_retention: 30 days after opt-out; 5+ years if opted in or for litigation purposes
notes: Privacy policy updated Feb 6, 2026 (general) and Feb 9, 2026 (US-specific). Memory can be disabled entirely or individual memories deleted. Temporary Chat mode available for ephemeral conversations.

name: Claude
disclosure_text: Claude can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.
opt_out_path: Settings > Privacy Settings > Data usage toggle
memory_disable_path: Settings > Capabilities > Pause memory or Reset memory
consent_flow: As of August 2025, new users select preference in signup; existing users saw pop-up. Toggle pre-checked to encourage acceptance. Opt-in retained for 5 years vs 30 days for opt-out.
data_retention: 30 days if opted out; up to 5 years if opted in
notes: Major policy change in Aug 2025 allowing training on user data with opt-in. Does NOT apply to Commercial Terms (Claude for Work, Government, Education, API, Bedrock, Vertex AI). Healthcare Privacy Policy added Jan 2026 for US states with health data laws. Enterprise plan owners can disable memory for entire organization.

name: Gemini
disclosure_text: Gemini may display inaccurate info, including about people, so double-check its responses.
opt_out_path: Gemini Apps Activity page > Turn off Gemini Apps Activity (formerly 'Keep Activity')
memory_disable_path: Settings > Personal Context > Your past chats (toggle off)
consent_flow: Activity and memory enabled by default. Users must manually disable. Auto-delete options: 3, 18, or 36 months.
data_retention: 72 hours minimum for stability/abuse detection (not used for training); configurable auto-delete at 3/18/36 months
notes: Renamed 'Gemini Apps Activity' to 'Keep Activity' in Aug 2025. Enterprise admins can disable memory/personalization for all users and manage data source connections. 2026 framework emphasizes transparency showing which data points were used.

name: Microsoft Copilot
opt_out_path: Profile > Settings > Privacy > Model training on text / Model training on voice
memory_disable_path: Profile > Settings > Privacy > Personalization (Saved memories toggle)
consent_flow: Data sharing on by default. Changed during first run or anytime in settings. Pulls data from Bing, MSN, Edge by default (separate toggle).
data_retention: 18 months by default for conversations; individual or all conversations can be deleted anytime
notes: Enterprise data NEVER used for training. Anthropic added as subprocessor Jan 7, 2026. M365 Copilot opted out of abuse monitoring with human review. Consumer version pulls data from other MS products (Bing, Edge, MSN) by default - separate toggle required. Memory updated with improved controls Nov 2025, GA Jan 2026.

name: Perplexity
disclosure_text: Perplexity is an AI search assistant. Always verify important facts.
opt_out_path: Profile > Settings > AI Data Usage (toggle off)
consent_flow: AI Data Retention enabled by default for Free/Pro/Max users. Must manually opt out to prevent training.
data_retention: Variable based on plan; Enterprise has zero retention
notes: Enterprise data NEVER used for training. Sonar API has Zero Data Retention Policy. When opted out, no questions or answers used for training/enhancement. Free/Pro/Max users must manually disable to protect privacy.

name: Notion AI
consent_flow: Opt-in 'AI LEAP Program' for voluntary data sharing to improve models. By default, workspace data NOT used for training but IS shared with AI partners (OpenAI, Anthropic).
data_retention: 30 days for Free/Plus/Business plans (AI partners); zero-retention APIs for Enterprise
notes: By default, Notion does NOT use workspace data to train models. However, data IS shared with AI partners who may retain for 30 days (abuse monitoring). Enterprise Plan uses zero-retention APIs (immediate deletion). Workspace admins can disable Notion AI entirely for organization. All subprocessors contractually prohibited from training on customer data.

name: Grammarly
opt_out_path: Account > Privacy Settings > Product Improvement and Training (toggle off)
consent_flow: Uses random samples of aggregated/de-identified content unless opted out. Non-content data (writing stats) collected even when opted out.
data_retention: Not publicly specified for training data
notes: Enterprise/Education accounts automatically opted out. When toggle OFF, no content used for training other users. Non-content data (statistics) still collected for improvement. LLM providers contractually prohibited from training on user content. Does not sell or monetize user content.

name: Jasper
consent_flow: Default policy: prompts/responses/projects NOT used for training unless explicitly opted in. Must contact support for CCPA opt-out rights.
notes: By DEFAULT, does NOT use prompts, responses, or saved projects for training (unless opted in). Partners with OpenAI/Anthropic but inputs/outputs not shared for training without opt-in. SOC 2 certified, GDPR compliant. Transparent data sourcing with opt-out paths for rightsholders.

name: ElevenLabs
opt_out_path: Profile icon > Terms and privacy > Data use > Improve the models for everyone (toggle off)
consent_flow: Uses data to improve audio models by default. User can opt out anytime. Custom voice data requires explicit consent, never shared without opt-in.
data_retention: Custom voice data deleted from training infrastructure within 30 days of deployment (unless retained for ongoing fine-tuning with user control)
notes: Does NOT clone voices without consent. Custom voice data never shared with third parties, never used for public models without explicit opt-in. Separate CCPA opt-out available via 'Your Privacy Choices' footer link. Once opted out, new data not used for training.

name: Suno
opt_out_path: Private mode limits visibility but unclear if excludes from training
consent_flow: Creators can restrict content from training use. Private mode limits visibility but processing exclusion unclear without explicit policy statement.
data_retention: Removes structured identifying info (usernames) before training use
notes: Training data: publicly available music files/metadata from open internet. Respects paywalls/password protections. Does NOT create login credentials to access walled content. Removes usernames from Content/User Activity before training. Does NOT sell user info. 2026 represents maturity phase with demand for ethical frameworks.

name: Runway
opt_out_path: Website footer > Your Privacy Choices OR designate authorized agent
consent_flow: Recognizes browser-based opt-out signals (Global Privacy Control). Users retain ownership of uploaded/generated content.
data_retention: May create aggregated/de-identified/anonymized data from personal info
notes: Users retain ownership and rights to all uploaded/generated content. SOC 2 Type II certified with annual recertification. GDPR compliant for EU users, CCPA/CPRA for California. Employees trained on privacy/security. Aggregation/anonymization may occur but ownership retained.

name: Synthesia
opt_out_path: Request opt-out; data/likeness deleted from databases
consent_flow: Avatar creation requires explicit consent with KYC-like procedure. Users control who accesses avatar, when, and how. Opt-out guarantees complete deletion.
notes: No unauthorized disclosure of Customer Data/Custom Avatars. Generation/collection/use won't access customer data beyond written instructions. Avatar requires explicit consent. Cookie Policy provides opt-out controls. Partnership on AI case study participant for Synthetic Media Framework.

name: Midjourney
temporary_mode: Stealth mode (paid plans) keeps images private
consent_flow: Does NOT use individual prompts for training. Does NOT sell personal info. Data deletion available within 30 days.
data_retention: 30 days for account/data deletion after request submission
notes: Does NOT use individual user prompts to train AI models. Does NOT sell personal information. Privacy policy covers midjourney.com, services via Discord, training data collection. Account deletion request processed within 30 days via account settings. For Discord training opt-out: Settings > Privacy & Safety > Use data to improve/customize Discord (both toggles off).

name: DALL-E
opt_out_path: Artists can opt-out images from future training (request to OpenAI); content creators use same ChatGPT settings
consent_flow: Creators/artists can opt out images from future model training (applies to future training only, not past). EU AI Act 2026 requires training data disclosure and copyright opt-outs.
notes: Images watermarked (signature in metadata; manifest for ChatGPT-generated images) starting 2024. Artists can opt out images from FUTURE training via request to OpenAI - does NOT apply retroactively. EU AI Act (effective Aug 1, 2026) requires machine-readable markings, visible disclosure for deepfakes, and training data transparency. Content policy enforced.

name: Stable Diffusion (DreamStudio)
opt_out_path: Account Settings > User Preferences > Training: Improve the Model for Everyone (toggle off)
consent_flow: Training opt-in by default. Users can opt out marketing via email unsubscribe or contact dreamstudio@stability.ai. Can opt out of data disclosure/sale to third parties.
data_retention: Variable; consent can be withdrawn but won't affect prior lawful processing
notes: Users can opt out of marketing, data disclosure/sale to third parties, and request info on what personal data shared. Privacy policy updated July 31, 2025. Data may transfer to third parties in mergers/acquisitions. Consent withdrawal doesn't affect lawfulness of prior processing. Training toggle available in DreamStudio account preferences.
